name: Spam Fiesta Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 can SPAM Luncheon Meat, cubed (12 oz)
1 can HORMEL Chili No Beans (15 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Combine refried beans and taco seasoning.
3. Spread the mixture in the bottom of a 12-inch pizza pan.
4. Layer green onions, SPAM, chili, and cheeses in the pan.
5. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until hot and cheese is melted.
6. Spread sour cream over the top.
7. Sprinkle with olives.
8. Serve with salsa and tortilla chips.
